name: homeassistant
description: Home Assistant REST API via dedicated broker listener :8082 and long-lived credential (C4)
config_hints: Before connector add: set cluster_address in deploy/broker/envoy.yaml (conn-homeassistant-0) to your HA host/IP — default 127.0.0.1:8123 is a placeholder
Create long-lived token in HA Profile → Security; write to deploy/broker/ha/token.txt (0600, not in git). Mount ha/secret.yaml + token.txt in docker-compose (see deploy/broker/ha/README.md)
